title: Well-Known Labels, Annotations and Taints — alpha.jobset.sigs.k8s.io/namespaced-job
text:
Type: Label
Example:
alpha.jobset.sigs.k8s.io/namespaced-job: "default_myjobset-replicatedjob-0"
Used on: Nodes
This label is either set manually or automatically (for example, a cluster autoscaler) on the nodes. When
alpha.jobset.sigs.k8s.io/node-selector
is set to
"true"
, the JobSet controller adds a nodeSelector to this node label (along with the toleration to the taint
alpha.jobset.sigs.k8s.io/no-schedule
discussed next).
